de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.reference

Class DefaultProofReference<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.reference.DefaultProofReference<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IProofReference<T>

    public class DefaultProofReference<T>
extends Object
implements IProofReference<T>
    Default implementation of IProofReference.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
